title: Wildborn Faries Origin
description: Play as either a fairy of the Wild, bloming with  life. Or as a fairy if Decay, Rotting all life away.
body:
Gives the player the ability to chose between 2 new origins the Fairy of the Wild and the Rotting Fairy. This mod was made using the Origins Creator, so feal free to upload it there to make any modifications. I do not own any of the tools used in its creation and do not wish to limit other's creativity. This mod was only tested on a client-sided world within the Fabric launcher. It should still work in Forge, though. Not all powers will be listed in the origins selector, so you’ll have to discover your strengths and weaknesses as you play.

Blooming kin

These fairy's are aligned with nature and nurtur the creation of life. viewing it as the penultimate of greatness. Taking a vow to defend there suroundings.

Common Powers

All of these power are shared between both fairy's in this category.

Neutral : - **Fairy's wand :** Multiple objects can be used as a wand and using them against people will send them flying. Works against friends and foes. - **The life of a Fairy :** Fairies are closely connected with nature. You and a plant have much more in common then you expect, from size, to weaknesses even to your diet. You both share a close bond. Also as a fairy to fit better in the vast plant world, your size has been decreesed significantly. _All of your damage counts as magic and cause glowing. You can not harm you pets. You are **UNABLE** to heal while on fire or in the Nether. You have **4** (Wild) or **2,5** (Bloom) less hearts. You can't eat meat. You are Green and have a cloud of leaves that folows you everywhere._ - **Low tolerence :** Due to you small stature. the effects of potions are much stronger on you than on normal people. Positive : - **Sunflower :** As a follower of the sun, this entity blesses you while you are in her light. _You have the ability to regain food and health while also having increased luck while in direct sunlight and for a short time afterward_ - **Natures Sight :** You can sens the presence of any living creature that is in in tall grass and punch without breaking it if sneaking. you also blend in extremly well with said grass. - **Fairy's knowledge :** As a fairy, when you were born, the knowledge of certain forgotten recipes is granted to you. Negative : - **Small :** you are ½ a block tall. Meaning you can walk into the hole of stairs! - **Dormancy :** you are much weaker in cold whether as you body is not maid for such a harsh environment. - **Magic heart :** You can only wear armor that is enchanted due to the magic constantly flowing trought your body. This also means all of the damage you deals counts as magic

Fairy of the Wild

The more common kind of these fairy. found all across the world where life prosper and flurishes

Actives : - **Sunbeam :** As a fairy, the sun grants you the power to use it's light to your advantage. _Fire a deadly beam of light at your enemys._ - **Fairy wings :** As a fairy you are light as a butterfly and can fly away wherever and whenever you would like. - **Farie's Dust :** To help grow nature around you, using your Secondary power will grant you the use of bone meal. Neutral : - **Fairy's luck :** As a fairy the nature loves you and rewards you for taking care of you crops. _You can rarely get bonus resources from farmable resource._ Positive : - **Light feets :** You take half fall damage. Negative : - **Flamable :** You take double fire damage.

Everblooming Fairy

Rarer in nature. They are usualy found attop any civilasation made by these fairy. rulling it with kindness and diplomacy. They have an inate conection with the plantlife that surounds them.

How to unlock

Get the "One Seed to Rule Them All." advancement by planting and harvesting almost every crop in the game.

List of crops required 1. wheat 2. carrot 3. potato 4. pumpkin 5. melon 6. beetroot 7. nether warts 8. sweet berry bush 9. kelp 10. bamboo 11. sugar cane 12. cactus 13. cocoa beans 14. glowberry vines
Powers Actives : - **Astralbeam :** As a fairy, the sun grants you the power to use it's light to your advantage. _Fire a deadly beam of light at your enemys._ - **Enchanted wings :** As a fairy you are light as a butterfly and can fly away wherever and whenever you would like. - **Radient Dust :** To help grow nature around you, using your Secondary power will grant you the use of bone meal. Neutral : - **Nature's gift :** As a fairy the nature loves you and rewards you for taking care of you crops. _You can rarely get bonus resources from farmable resource. The list has been expanded_ Positive : - **Light feets :** You take no fall damage. - **Nature's savior :** The environment around sees you as a blessing and will grant you some in return. _You have the hero of the vilage effect._ Negative : - **Flamable :** You take 1.5 time fire damage.

Roting kin (still in developement)
Common Powers

Rotting Fairy

Fairy of decay

How to unlock

colect the head of 3 undead mobs

Powers

Good luck and have fun!
